## Testing

- [ ] `bun run test`

## Changesets

- [ ] This PR includes a changeset for changes to `@kael/ui`, `@kael/typescript-config`, or `web`
- [ ] No changeset is needed because this change is docs-only, example-only, CI-only, or internal-only
- [ ] This PR targets the intended branch (`next` for feature work, or `main` only for a `next` → `main` release merge)

## Release Flow

- [ ] I understand that package versions and CHANGELOGs are updated automatically when changesets reach `main`
- [ ] After a release merge to `main`, `next` should be synced back from `main`

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation was updated when needed
